# data

**Interface Property**

Data that you define and assign to the annotation.

## Declaration

```swift
data?: object;
```

## Discussion

Custom data to associate with this annotation. The default value is `{}.`

## Creating data and titles

- **title**: The text to display in the annotation’s callout.
- **subtitle**: The text to display as a subtitle on the second line of an annotation’s callout.
- **accessibilityLabel**: Accessibility text for the annotation.
